title: White House calls Iran-published MoU draft 'complete fabrication' — disputes Tehran's version of deal terms
snippet: The White House described an Iranian state media report about the MOU as a 'complete fabrication.' Iranian state television had published a draft showing US would lift naval blockade and withdraw troops. White House: 'This report from Iranian controlled media is not true and the MOU they released is a complete fabrication. Nobody should believe what Iranian state media is putting out.' However, some details in Iran's report are similar to how US officials described the emerging deal.
tag_reason: White House 'complete fabrication' denial is new — escalation of messaging war between US and Iran over MoU content
